description: Okunoonyereza okunoonyereza ku bitabo ebyawandiikibwa nga Kristo tannajja — okuva ku Mateeka ne Bannabbi okutuuka ku Byawandiikibwa. Endagaano enkadde eyogera ku ndagaano ya Katonda ne Isiraeri era n’esonga ku Masiya.

sections.description: Ebitabo ebitaano ebisooka ebya Baibuli (Pentateuch), ebikwata ku kutonda, okugwa, okuva, n’okuwaayo Amateeka — omusingi Ebyawandiikibwa ebirala kwe bizimba.

subsections.name: Olubereberye
subsections.description: Ekitabo ky’entandikwa: obutonzi, okugwa, n’abajjajja — Ibulayimu, Isaaka, Yakobo, ne Yusufu.

subsections.name: Okuva
subsections.description: Katonda anunula abantu be okuva mu buddu e Misiri, abikkula erinnya lye, era n’awa Amateeka ge e Sinaayi.

subsections.name: Eby’Abaleevi
subsections.description: Ebiragiro ebikwata ku kusinza n’obutukuvu, ebiraga engeri abantu aboonoonyi gye bayinza okusemberera Katonda omutukuvu.

subsections.name: Ennamba
subsections.description: Olugendo lwa Isiraeri mu ddungu — okulemererwa kwayo, okukangavvula kwayo, n’obwesigwa bwa Katonda obutasalako.

subsections.name: Ekyamateeka
subsections.description: Okubuulira kwa Musa okw’okusiibula, okuzza obuggya endagaano n’okuteekateeka Isirayiri okuyingira mu Nsi Ensuubize.

sections.description: Ebitabo by’ebyafaayo bilondoola emboozi ya Isirayiri okuva ku kuwamba Kanani okuyita mu bwakabaka, obuwanganguse, n’okudda — nga biraga obwesigwa bwa Katonda n’obutali bwesigwa bw’abantu be enfunda n’enfunda.

subsections.name: Yoswa
subsections.description: Okuwamba n’okugabanyaamu Ensi Ensuubize wansi w’obukulembeze bwa Yoswa.

subsections.name: Abalamuzi
subsections.description: Enzirukanya y’obujeemu, okunyigirizibwa, n’okununulibwa nga Isiraeri ekyuka enfunda n’enfunda okuva ku Katonda.

subsections.name: Luusi
subsections.description: Emboozi y’obwesigwa, okulabirira, n’okununulibwa eyateekebwawo mu kiseera ky’abalamuzi.

subsections.name: 1 Samwiri
subsections.description: Okukyuka okuva ku balamuzi okudda ku bakabaka: Samwiri, Sawulo, n’okusituka kwa Dawudi.

subsections.name: 2 Samwiri
subsections.description: Obufuzi bwa Dawudi — obuwanguzi bwe, okulemererwa kwe, n’endagaano ya Katonda n’ennyumba ye.

subsections.name: 1 Bassekabaka
subsections.description: Ekitiibwa kya Sulemaani n'enjawukana y'obwakabaka; Eriya n’okuvuganya ku lusozi Kalumeeri.

subsections.name: 2 Bassekabaka
subsections.description: Okukendeera n’okugwa kw’obwakabaka bwombi, okuggwa mu buwanganguse.

subsections.name: 1 Ebyomumirembe
subsections.description: Okuddamu okunyumya ebyafaayo bya Isiraeri okuva ku Adamu okutuuka ku Dawudi, nga essira lyali lisinga kulissa ku kusinza ne yeekaalu.

subsections.name: 2 Ebyomumirembe
subsections.description: Sulemaani ne yeekaalu, obwakabaka obwawuddwamu, n’essuubi ery’okuzzaawo.

subsections.name: Ezera
subsections.description: Okudda okuva mu buwaŋŋanguse n’okuddamu okuzimba yeekaalu wansi w’obukulembeze bwa Ezera.

subsections.name: Nekkemiya
subsections.description: Okuddamu okuzimba bbugwe wa Yerusaalemi n’okuzza obuggya ekibiina ky’endagaano.

subsections.name: Eseza
subsections.description: Obulabirizi bwa Katonda obukwekebwa ng’akuuma abantu be mu lubiri lwa Buperusi.

sections.description: Yobu, Zabbuli, Engero, Omubuulizi, n’Oluyimba — ebitabo ebinoonyereza ku buziba bw’obumanyirivu bw’omuntu: okubonaabona, okutenderezebwa, amagezi, n’okwagala.

subsections.name: Omulimu
subsections.description: Okunoonyereza okw’amaanyi ku kubonaabona, obwenkanya, n’ekyama ky’amakubo ga Katonda.

subsections.name: Zabbuli
subsections.description: Ekitabo ky’ennyimba n’ekitabo ky’okusaba ekya Isirayiri — enneewulira z’omuntu zonna ezaaleetebwa mu maaso ga Katonda.

subsections.name: Engero
subsections.description: Amagezi ag’omugaso mu bulamu obwa bulijjo, nga gasibuka mu kutya Mukama.

subsections.name: Omubuulizi
subsections.description: Okukebera okunoonya amakulu, emirimu, n’okufa ‘wansi w’enjuba’.

subsections.name: Oluyimba lw'Enyimba
subsections.description: Okujaguza omukwano n’obufumbo, okugaggawala n’ebifaananyi eby’essanyu n’okwegomba.

sections.description: Ebitabo by’obunnabbi biyita Isirayiri okwenenya, okulabula ku musango, era ne bisonga mu maaso okununulibwa kwa Katonda okw’enkomerero. Byetaagisa nnyo okutegeera okutuukirizibwa kw’Endagaano Empya ku bisuubizo ebyo.

subsections.name: Isaaya
subsections.description: Omusango n’essuubi eriwunyiriza — nga mw’otwalidde n’Ennyimba z’Omuweereza ezisonga ku Kristo.

subsections.name: Yeremiya
subsections.description: Obulumi bwa nnabbi nga Yerusaalemi egwa, n'okusuubiza endagaano empya.

subsections.name: Okukungubaga
subsections.description: Ennaku embisi olw’okuzikirizibwa kwa Yerusaalemi, ekwatiddwa wamu olw’essuubi mu bwesigwa bwa Katonda.

subsections.name: Ezeekyeri
subsections.description: Okwolesebwa kw’ekitiibwa kya Katonda okugenda n’okudda, n’okusuubiza okuzzibwa obuggya mu by’omwoyo.

subsections.name: Danyeri
subsections.description: Okubeerawo n’obwesigwa mu buwaŋŋanguse, n’okwolesebwa kw’obwakabaka bwa Katonda obufuga amawanga gonna.

subsections.name: Koseya
subsections.description: Okwagala kwa Katonda okutaggwaawo eri abantu abatali beesigwa, okwalagibwa mu bufumbo bwa Koseya yennyini.

subsections.name: Yoweri
subsections.description: Ekibonyoobonyo ky’enzige ng’okukoowoola okwenenya, n’okusuubiza Omwoyo.

subsections.name: Amosi
subsections.description: Omulanga ogw’obunnabbi ogw’amaanyi ogw’obwenkanya n’okulabula nti eddiini etaliimu kintu kyonna tegenda kuyimirira.

subsections.name: Obadiya
subsections.description: Okwogera okumpimpi ku Edomu n’olunaku lwa Mukama olujja.

subsections.name: Yona
subsections.description: Okusaasira kwa Katonda eri amawanga — ne nnabbi atayagala okukiziyiza.

subsections.name: Mikka
subsections.description: Obwenkanya, okusaasira, n’obwetoowaze — n’ekisuubizo ky’omufuzi okuva e Besirekemu.

subsections.name: Nakumu
subsections.description: Okugwa kw’e Nineeve n’okubudaabudibwa kw’obwenkanya bwa Katonda eri abantu be abanyigirizibwa.

subsections.name: Kaabakuuku
subsections.description: Okumegganyizibwa mu bwesimbu ne Katonda olw’obutali bwenkanya, n’okuyiga okwesiga obudde bwe.

subsections.name: Zeffaniya
subsections.description: Olunaku lwa Mukama n’essanyu ery’okuzzibwawo eri ensigalira erongooseddwa.

subsections.name: Kaggayi
subsections.description: Omulanga gw’okuddamu okuzimba yeekaalu n’okukulembeza ennyumba ya Katonda okusinga okubudaabudibwa okw’obuntu.

subsections.name: Zekkaliya
subsections.description: Okwolesebwa okw’okuzzaawo ne Masiya ajja mu bwetoowaze ku ndogoyi.

subsections.name: Malaki
subsections.description: Omulanga ogusembayo eri obwesigwa nga tebannaba kusirika okumala ebbanga eddene mu maaso ga Yokaana Omubatiza.

description: Okusoma mu bitabo ebyawandiikibwa oluvannyuma lw’okujja kwa Kristo — Enjiri, ebbaluwa z’abatume, n’Okubikkulirwa. Endagaano empya eraga okutuukirizibwa kw’ebisuubizo bya Katonda mu Yesu n’obulamu bw’ekkanisa eyasooka.

sections.description: Ebiwandiiko ebina ebikwata ku bulamu bwa Yesu, okufa, n’okuzuukira, n’emboozi y’okugaziwa kw’ekkanisa eyasooka mu nsi y’Abaruumi.

subsections.name: Matayo
subsections.description: Yesu nga okutuukirizibwa kw’Endagaano Enkadde, Musa omuggya, ne Kabaka w’obwakabaka bwa Katonda.

subsections.name: Mark
subsections.description: Emboozi ey’amangu ekwata ku Yesu ng’Omuweereza era Omwana wa Katonda abonaabona.

subsections.name: Lukka
subsections.description: Yesu ng’Omulokozi w’ensi — ng’afaayo nnyo ku baavu, abakyala, n’ab’ebweru.

subsections.name: Yokaana
subsections.description: Ekifaananyi ky’eby’eddiini ekisinga obuziba ekya Yesu — Ekigambo ekyafuulibwa omubiri, NZE, Omwana wa Katonda.

subsections.name: Ebikolwa by’Abatume
subsections.description: Omwoyo Omutukuvu awa ekkanisa amaanyi okutwala enjiri okuva e Yerusaalemi okutuuka ku nkomerero z’ensi.

sections.description: Ebbaluwa za Pawulo eri amakanisa n’abantu ssekinnoomu — okunoonyereza ku nsonga z’enjiri, enneeyisa y’Ekikristaayo, n’obutonde bw’ekkanisa.

subsections.name: Abaruumi
subsections.description: Ennyonyola ya Pawulo esinga entegeke ku njiri: ekibi, obutuukirivu, okutukuzibwa, n’essuubi.

subsections.name: 1 Abakkolinso
subsections.description: Okukola ku njawukana n’obutabanguko mu Kkolinso, nga tuyigiriza ku kwagala, ebirabo, n’okuzuukira.

subsections.name: 2 Abakkolinso
subsections.description: Pawulo okulwanirira obuweereza bwe n’enjawukana y’amaanyi okuyita mu bunafu.

subsections.name: Abaggalatiya
subsections.description: Okulwanirira n’obwagazi okuweebwa obutuukirivu olw’okukkiriza kwokka eri abo abagattako amateeka.

subsections.name: Abaefeso
subsections.description: Obugagga bw’omuntu omukkiriza mu Kristo, n’ekkanisa ng’obuntu bwa Katonda obupya.

subsections.name: Abafiripi
subsections.description: Essanyu mu mbeera zonna n’ekyokulabirako eky’obwetoowaze bwa Kristo.

subsections.name: Abakkolosaayi
subsections.description: Kristo nga ow’oku ntikko ku bintu byonna, n’ebigendererwa mu bulamu obwa bulijjo.

subsections.name: 1 Abasessaloniika
subsections.description: Okuzzaamu amaanyi eri ekkanisa ento, nga waliwo okuyigiriza ku kudda kwa Kristo.

subsections.name: 2 Abasessaloniika
subsections.description: Okutereeza obutategeeragana ku biseera by’enkomerero, n’okukoowoola okukola emirimu egy’obwesigwa.

subsections.name: 1 Timoseewo
subsections.description: Ebiragiro ku bulamu bw’ekkanisa, obukulembeze, n’enjigiriza ennungi.

subsections.name: 2 Timoseewo
subsections.description: Ebbaluwa ya Pawulo esembayo — omusango eri Timoseewo okukuuma enjiri n’okumaliriza obulungi.

subsections.name: Tito
subsections.description: Okulonda abakulembeze n’okuyigiriza enjigiriza eyo ennungi kiviirako omuntu okufuna obulamu obw’okutya Katonda.

subsections.name: Filemoni
subsections.description: Okujulira okw’obuntu okutabagana n’ebikwata ku njiri mu mbeera z’abantu.

sections.description: Ebbaluwa okuva ewa Yakobo, Peetero, Yokaana, Yuda, n’abalala — ezikwata ku kukkiriza mu kugezesebwa, okukkiriza okwa nnamaddala, okuyigiriza okw’obulimba, n’essuubi erisembayo ery’Okubikkulirwa.

subsections.name: Abebbulaniya
subsections.description: Yesu ng’okutuukirizibwa kw’obwakabona bwonna obw’Endagaano Enkadde, ssaddaaka, n’endagaano — okusinga mu buli ngeri.

subsections.name: Yakobo
subsections.description: Okukkiriza okukola — amagezi ag’omugaso ag’okubeera ng’abantu ba Katonda mu nsi.

subsections.name: 1 Peetero
subsections.description: Essuubi n’obulamu obutukuvu eri abawaŋŋanguse mu nsi ey’obulabe.

subsections.name: 2 Peetero
subsections.description: Okulabula ku basomesa ab’obulimba n’okwesiga ebisuubizo bya Katonda.

subsections.name: 1 Yokaana
subsections.description: Okukakasa obulokozi n’obubonero bw’okukkiriza okwa nnamaddala: okwagala, obuwulize, n’amazima.

subsections.name: 2 Yokaana
subsections.description: Ebbaluwa ennyimpimpi ku kwagala, amazima, n’obutasembeza abo abeegaana Kristo.

subsections.name: 3 Yokaana
subsections.description: Okusiima okusembeza abagenyi n’obwesigwa n’okulabula ku bukulembeze obweyagaza.

subsections.name: Yuda
subsections.description: Omulanga ogw’amaanyi okulwanirira okukkiriza okulwanyisa enjigiriza ey’obulimba eyeekulukuunya mu kkanisa.

subsections.name: Okubikkulirwa
subsections.description: Okwolesebwa kw’obuwanguzi bwa Katonda obw’enkomerero ku bubi, okusalirwa omusango gw’ababi, n’okuzza obuggya ebintu byonna.

description: Okunoonyereza kwali kussa essira ku njigiriza y’Ekikristaayo — Baibuli ky’eyigiriza ku Katonda, obuntu, obulokozi, n’ebiseera eby’omu maaso. Okwenyweza mu nzikiriza entuufu gwe musingi gw’obulamu obutuufu.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza okwanjula nga kwekenneenya enjigiriza yonna ey’Ekikristaayo — enjiri, enjigiriza enkulu, n’okwatula kw’ekkanisa okw’ebyafaayo.

subsections.name: Emisingi
subsections.description: Ebizimba ebikulu eby’enzikiriza y’Ekikristaayo — buli mukkiriza by’alina okumanya.

subsections.name: Enjiri
subsections.description: Okunoonyereza kwassa essira ku mutima gw’obubaka bw’Ekikristaayo: ekibi, ekisa, n’obulokozi okuyita mu Kristo.

subsections.name: Enzikiriza & Okwatula
subsections.description: Ebigambo by’ebyafaayo eby’okukkiriza ebibadde binnyonnyola Obukristaayo obw’ennono okuyita mu byasa.

sections.description: Katonda y’ani? Okunoonyereza okunoonyereza ku Busatu, engeri za Katonda, ne kye kitegeeza okumumanya kinnoomu.

subsections.name: Ebitendo bya Katonda
subsections.description: Obutukuvu bwa Katonda, okwagala kwe, obufuzi bwe, obwenkanya, n’engeri endala Ebyawandiikibwa bye biraga.

subsections.name: Obusatu
subsections.description: Katonda omu mu bantu basatu — Kitaffe, Omwana, n’Omwoyo Omutukuvu — era lwaki kino kikulu.

subsections.name: Katonda Kitaffe
subsections.description: Katonda nga Omutonzi, Kabaka, era Kitaffe — ne kye kitegeeza okubeera omwana we.

sections.description: Okusoma ku Baibuli yennyini — engeri gye yatuuka, kiki kye yeewozaako ku yo, n’engeri y’okugisoma obulungi.

subsections.name: Obuyinza
subsections.description: Lwaki Bayibuli erina eddembe okwogera mu buli kitundu ky’obulamu.

subsections.name: Okulung'amizibwa
subsections.description: Engeri Katonda gye yakola ng’ayita mu bawandiisi b’abantu okutuwa Ekigambo kye.

subsections.name: Canon
subsections.description: Engeri ebitabo bya Baibuli gye byategeerwa era ne bikuŋŋaanyizibwa wamu.

subsections.name: Okuvvuunula
subsections.description: Emisingi gy’okusoma Baibuli mu bwesigwa era mu butuufu.

sections.description: Okusoma ku kye kitegeeza okuba omuntu — eyakolebwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda, eyakolebwa mu mubiri, era yatondebwa olw’ekigendererwa.

subsections.name: Obutonzi
subsections.description: Katonda nga Omutonzi w’ebintu byonna — n’ekyo kye kitegeeza ku ngeri gye tutunuuliramu ensi.

subsections.name: Ekifaananyi kya Katonda
subsections.description: Kye kitegeeza okukolebwa mu kifaananyi kya Katonda, n’ekitiibwa ekiwa buli muntu.

subsections.name: Embodiment y’omuntu
subsections.description: Obulungi bw’okubeera n’omubiri, n’ebyo Ebyawandiikibwa bye byogera ku kubeerawo okw’omubiri.

subsections.name: Omugaso
subsections.description: Lwaki tuli wano — okuyitibwa kw’omuntu okwagala Katonda, okuweereza abalala, n’okuwanika ebitonde.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza ku kibi — ensibuko yaakyo, obutonde bwakyo, n’ebikosa abantu n’ensi.

subsections.name: Obutonde bw’Ekibi
subsections.description: Ekibi kye kiri ddala — si kumenya mateeka gokka, naye okukyuka okw’omusingi okuva ku Katonda.

subsections.name: Okugwa
subsections.description: Ebyo ebyaliwo mu Olubereberye 3, n’engeri gye bikwata ku buli muntu.

subsections.name: Okukemebwa
subsections.description: Engeri okukemebwa gye kukola, n’engeri abakkiriza gye bayinza okuyimirira nga banywevu okugiziyiza.

sections.description: Okusoma ku muntu wa Yesu Kristo — Katonda mu bujjuvu era omuntu mu bujjuvu — n’okujja kwe kye kutegeeza.

subsections.name: Omuntu wa Kristo
subsections.description: Enjigiriza y’obutonde obubiri — engeri Yesu gy’ali ow’obwakatonda mu bujjuvu era ow’obuntu mu bujjuvu.

subsections.name: Okufuuka omuntu
subsections.description: Lwaki Omwana wa Katonda yafuuka omubiri, n’obuntu bwe kye butegeeza gye tuli.

sections.description: Katonda anunula atya aboonoonyi? Okunoonyereza okukwata ku kutangirira, okuweebwa obutuukirivu, okuzaalibwa, n’okusenya kwonna okw’ebyo Katonda by’akola okutulokola.

subsections.name: Okutangirira
subsections.description: Engeri okufa kwa Kristo gye kukwatamu ekibi — okukyusakyusa, okununulibwa, okutabagana, n’ebirala.

subsections.name: Okukyuka
subsections.description: Kye kitegeeza okuva mu kibi n’okwesiga Kristo — okwenenya n’okukkiriza.

subsections.name: Ensonga enkulu
subsections.description: Okulangibwa okuba omutuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda — olw’ekisa kyokka, olw’okukkiriza kwokka, mu Kristo yekka.

subsections.name: Okuzaala abaana
subsections.description: Ekirabo eky’enjawulo eky’okuleetebwa mu maka ga Katonda nga batabani be ne bawala be.

sections.description: Okusoma ku Mwoyo Omutukuvu — ani, by’akola, n’engeri gy’akola mu bakkiriza n’ekkanisa.

subsections.name: Omuntu w’Omwoyo
subsections.description: Omwoyo Omutukuvu ng’omuntu owokusatu ow’Obusatu — si maanyi, wabula omuntu.

subsections.name: Ekibala ky’Omwoyo
subsections.description: Engeri z’empisa Omwoyo z’afulumya mu abo abatambula naye.

subsections.name: Ebirabo eby’Omwoyo
subsections.description: Ebirabo Omwoyo by’awa okusobola okufunira abakkiriza eby’okuweereza mu mubiri gwa Kristo.

sections.description: Ekkanisa kye ki, era lwaki kikulu? Okusoma ku butonde, obutume, n’ensengeka y’omubiri gwa Kristo.

subsections.name: Obutonde bw’Ekkanisa
subsections.description: Ekkanisa kyeri — abantu ba Katonda, omubiri gwa Kristo, yeekaalu y’Omwoyo.

subsections.name: Amasakramentu
subsections.description: Okubatizibwa n’ekyeggulo kya Mukama waffe — kye biri, kye bitegeeza, n’engeri y’okubikuumamu.

subsections.name: Obukulembeze
subsections.description: Enkola za Baibuli ez’obukulembeze bw’ekkanisa: abakadde, abadyankoni, n’obuyinza obw’omutima gw’omuweereza.

subsections.name: Okusinza
subsections.description: Okusinza kw’Ekikristaayo kye ki, lwaki kukulu, n’engeri gye kubumbamu obulamu bw’ekitundu.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza ku kufa, okuzuukira, omusango, n’ebitonde ebipya — essuubi eribumba engeri Abakristaayo gye babeera mu kiseera kino.

subsections.name: Okudda kwa Kristo
subsections.description: Essuubi erikakafu nti Yesu ajja kudda mu kitiibwa okusalira abalamu n’abafu omusango.

subsections.name: Okusala omusango
subsections.description: Ensala ya Katonda esembayo ku bantu bonna — n’amawulire amalungi nti Kristo yeetikka omusango ku lulwe.

subsections.name: Eggulu & Geyena
subsections.description: Enkomerero ezitaggwaawo Ebyawandiikibwa bye binnyonnyola — era lwaki bikulu ku ngeri gye tubeera kati.

description: Okunoonyereza okuyunga amazima ga Baibuli ku bumanyirivu obwa bulijjo obw’okugoberera Kristo — mu nkolagana, emirimu, endagamuntu, n’okulwana okugenda mu maaso n’ekibi.

sections.description: Enkola ezitutendeka okusigala kumpi ne Katonda n’okukula mu kutya Katonda — si ngeri ya kufuna kusiimibwa, wabula emize egitukuuma nga tuggule eri ekisa kye.

subsections.name: Okusaba
subsections.description: Okwogera ne Katonda — emisingi gyayo, ebifaananyi byayo, n’engeri y’okukulaakulanya obulamu bw’okusaba obw’obugagga.

subsections.name: Okusoma Baibuli
subsections.description: Engeri y’okusomamu Ebyawandiikibwa obulungi — n’okutegeera, okukwatagana, n’okusuubira okukyusibwa.

subsections.name: Okusinza
subsections.description: Okusinza ng’ennyimiririra y’obulamu bwonna, so si mulimu gwa Ssande yokka.

sections.description: Enkola egenda mu maaso ey’okufuuka nga Kristo — okulwanyisa ekibi, okukula mu mpisa ennungi, n’okutegeera kye tuli mu ye.

subsections.name: Ekibala ky’Omwoyo
subsections.description: Okwagala, essanyu, emirembe, obugumiikiriza, ekisa, obulungi, obwesigwa, obukkakkamu, n’okwefuga.

subsections.name: Okuwangula Ekibi
subsections.description: Obuyambi obw’omugaso n’obw’eby’eddiini mu kukola ku nkola z’ekibi ezitaggwaawo.

subsections.name: Okukula mu Ekisa
subsections.description: Bwe kifaanana okukula ng’Omukristaayo — n’ekiyingira mu kkubo.

subsections.name: Endagamuntu mu Kristo
subsections.description: Kye tuli olw’ebyo Kristo by’akoze — era lwaki ekyo kikyusa buli kimu.

sections.description: Okusoma ku nkolagana Katonda gy’atutaddemu — obufumbo, amaka, omukwano, n’ekitundu.

subsections.name: Obufumbo
subsections.description: Endagaano y’obufumbo — ekigendererwa kyayo, okusoomoozebwa kwayo, n’ekifaananyi kyayo ekya Kristo n’ekkanisa.

subsections.name: Obutabeera obwannamunigina
subsections.description: Obufumbo ng’okuyitibwa okujjuvu era okw’amakulu, so si kisenge mwe balindirira obufumbo.

subsections.name: Okuzaala abaana
subsections.description: Okukuza abaana mu kukkiriza — n’ekisa, amazima, n’endowooza ey’ekiseera ekiwanvu.

subsections.name: Omukwaano
subsections.description: Ekirabo ky’omukwano gw’Ekikristaayo — n’engeri y’okulima enkolagana egenda mu buziba.

subsections.name: Enjogerezaganya
subsections.description: Okwogera mu mazima n’ekisa — n’okuwuliriza obulungi.

subsections.name: Ekyaalo
subsections.description: Kye kitegeeza okubeera ng’omubiri gwa Kristo — nga buli omu yeetikka emigugu gya munne.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza okukozesa enjiri ku mulimu, ssente, obudde, n’okwegomba — okulaba emirimu egya bulijjo ng’ekitundu ku bigendererwa bya Katonda.

subsections.name: Obulamu bw'emirimu
subsections.description: Baibuli ky’eyogera ku mulimu — obulungi bwagwo, ebigunyiiza, n’okununulibwa kwagwo mu Kristo.

subsections.name: Ssente & Ebintu
subsections.description: Obugabi, obumativu, n’endowooza ya Baibuli ku by’obugagga.

subsections.name: Obuwanika bw’Ebiseera
subsections.description: Engeri gye tukozesaamu ebiseera byaffe — n’engeri enjiri gy’ekyusaamu ebitukulembeza.

subsections.name: Okwagala ekintu
subsections.description: Holy ambition vs. selfish ambition — n’engeri y’okutegeera enjawulo.

subsections.name: Okuwummula
subsections.description: Obulamu obw’obwesigwa bwe bufaanana mu sizoni ez’oluvannyuma ez’obulamu.

sections.description: Engeri abakkiriza gye balowooza n’okukola ku bibuuzo eby’empisa eby’amangu eby’omulembe gwaffe — okuva ku bwenkanya mu bantu okutuuka ku mpisa z’ebiramu okutuuka ku tekinologiya.

subsections.name: Obwenkanya mu mbeera z’abantu
subsections.description: Omutima gwa Katonda eri abataliiko mwasirizi n’abanyigirizibwa, n’ekyo kye kitegeeza gye tuli.

subsections.name: Empisa z’ebiramu
subsections.description: Ensonga z’entandikwa n’enkomerero y’obulamu — zituukirirwa n’okufaayo n’okusaasira okw’eby’eddiini.

subsections.name: Tekinologiya akwatagana
subsections.description: Engeri y’okukozesaamu tekinologiya n’obwesigwa mu nsi ekoleddwamu.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza okuyamba abakkiriza okutambulira mu bulumi, obutali bukakafu, n’obuzibu n’obwesimbu n’essuubi.

subsections.name: Ebigezo n’Okubonaabona
subsections.description: Lwaki Katonda akkiriza okubonaabona, n’engeri Ebyawandiikibwa gye bituwa ebyuma okugugumira n’essuubi.

subsections.name: Okutegeera Katonda By’ayagala
subsections.description: Engeri y’okusalawo mu ngeri ey’amagezi — n’ebyo ebyawandiikibwa mu butuufu bye bisuubiza ku bulagirizi.

subsections.name: Obulamu bw'obwongo
subsections.description: Okwennyamira, okweraliikirira, n‟entalo endala — yatuukirirwa n‟okusaasira n‟okufaayo okuva mu Baibuli.

subsections.name: Okukungubaga
subsections.description: Engeri y’okunakuwala ng’abo abalina essuubi — mu bwesimbu, so si bokka.

description: Okusoma eri abo abeenyigira mu kuweereza abalala — mu kubuulira enjiri, okulabirira abasumba, okusomesa, n’obukulembeze. Emirandira mu Byawandiikibwa, okunoonyereza kuno kuwa abakkiriza ebyuma okuweereza obulungi era mu ngeri ey’okuwangaala.

sections.description: Emisingi gya Baibuli egy’obuweereza bwonna obw’Ekikristaayo — kye kitegeeza okuweereza, n’omuntu wa ngeri ki omuweereza gy’alina okuba.

subsections.name: Obukulembeze bw’Omuweereza
subsections.description: Okukulembera nga Yesu bwe yakulembera — n’obwetoowaze, okwewaayo, n’okufaayo ku abo abaweereza.

subsections.name: Okukuba essimu
subsections.description: Okutegeera okuyitibwa kwo mu buweereza — engeri gye kutegeerwamu ne bye kuzingiramu.

sections.description: Okusoma eri abo abayitibwa okunnyonnyola Baibuli mu lujjudde — nga kukwata ku nkola, empisa, n’obuzito bw’okukwata Ekigambo kya Katonda.

subsections.name: Okubuulira Okunnyonnyola
subsections.description: Engeri y’okubuulira n’obwesigwa okuva mu kiwandiiko — okuleka Baibuli okuteekawo enteekateeka.

subsections.name: Okukulembera Okuyiga Baibuli
subsections.description: Engeri y’okukulembera ekibiina obulungi — okubuuza ebibuuzo ebirungi n’okuyamba abantu okusisinkana Katonda mu kiwandiiko.

sections.description: Ebipimo by’enkola n’eby’eddiini eby’okukulembera ekkanisa oba obuweereza — okwolesebwa, ttiimu, enkaayana, n’enfuga.

subsections.name: Okwolesebwa & Enkola
subsections.description: Engeri y’okulowooza obulungi ku Katonda gy’akulembera n’engeri y’okutuukayo nga tuli wamu.

subsections.name: Okuzimba ttiimu
subsections.description: Okukung’aanya, okukulaakulanya, n’okuyimirizaawo ttiimu y’obuweereza ennungi.

subsections.name: Okugonjoola obutakkaanya
subsections.description: Engeri y’okukwatamu obutakkaanya n’enjawukana mu ngeri essa ekitiibwa mu Katonda n’okukuuma obumu.

subsections.name: Enfuga y’Ekkanisa
subsections.description: Ensengeka n’enkola eziyamba ekkanisa okuvunaanyizibwa n’okusengekebwa obulungi.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza okusobozesa abakkiriza okutambula ku mabbali ga bannaabwe mu buzibu, mu kufiirwa, mu buzibu, n’obwetaavu.

subsections.name: Emboozi z'Obusumba
subsections.description: Obukugu n’enyimirira ebyetaagisa mu mboozi z’obuweereza ez’omuntu ku muntu eziyamba.

subsections.name: Okuyingira mu nsonga z’obuzibu
subsections.description: Engeri y’okuddamu mu ngeri ey’amagezi n’okusaasira ng’omuntu ali mu buzibu obw’amaanyi.

subsections.name: Okukyalira ensiko
subsections.description: Obuweereza bw’okubeerawo — okukyalira abalwadde, abakadde, n’abatali waka.

subsections.name: Okuteekateeka obufumbo
subsections.description: Okuyamba abafumbo okwetegekera obufumbo obuzimbibwa ku Kristo.

subsections.name: Okulabirira Abafiiriddwa
subsections.description: Okutambula n’abo abali mu nnaku — kiki kye balina okwogera, kye batalina kwogera, n’engeri y’okusigala.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza ku kutwala enjiri eri abo abatagiwulira — kinnoomu, mu kitundu, ne mu buwangwa bwonna.

subsections.name: Okubuulira Omuntu
subsections.description: Engeri y’okugabana okukkiriza kwo mu butonde era mu ngeri entegeerekeka mu mboozi eza bulijjo.

subsections.name: Okwetonda
subsections.description: Okuddamu ebibuuzo ebiremesa abantu obutatwala Bukristaayo ng’ekikulu.

subsections.name: Minisitule y’ebyobuwangwa eby’enjawulo
subsections.description: Okuweereza n‟okugabana okuyita ku nsalo z‟obuwangwa n‟obuwulize n‟ekitiibwa.

subsections.name: Okusimba Ekkanisa
subsections.description: Enjigiriza n’enkola y’okutandikawo ebitundu by’enjiri ebipya.

sections.description: Okunoonyereza ku buweereza bw’okuyamba abalala okukula — omu ku omu, mu bibinja ebitonotono, era nga batendeka omulembe oguddako.

subsections.name: Obuweereza bw’Omu ku Omu
subsections.description: Amaanyi g’obuyigirizwa mu bugenderevu, obw’obuntu — okusisinkana buli kiseera okuggulawo Baibuli nga tuli wamu.

subsections.name: Okukulembera Ekibinja Ekitono
subsections.description: Engeri y’okukulembera ekibinja ekitono eky’amazima, ekikula, era nga kyesigamiziddwa ku Byawandiikibwa.

subsections.name: Okutendeka Abalala
subsections.description: Okuwa abalala ebyuma okukola omulimu gw’obuweereza — okukubisaamu si bakyufu bokka wabula n’abakulembeze.

description: Okunoonyereza okutakwatagana bulungi mu kiti kirala — oba nga amawulire gaabwe aga shelf tegannaba kuteekebwawo.
